title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
description: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.

title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
description: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.

title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
description: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.

title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
description: Speculators now see just a 43% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.

title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
description: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
description: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
description: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.

title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
description: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.

title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
description: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.

title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
description: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.

title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
description: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.

title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
description: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.

title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
description: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.

title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
description: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.

title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
description: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.

title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
description: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."

title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
description: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.

title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
description: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.

title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.

title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
description: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
